name: @db-ux/core-components
description: General technical components (styling, fonts and icons) out of DB UX Design System (Version 3)
author: DB Systel GmbH

scripts.build: run-s build-components build-assets && pnpm run build-style:01_sass && pnpm run build-style:02_postcss
scripts.build-components: pnpm run build:mitosis && pnpm run build-components:post && pnpm run build-components:docs
scripts.compile:angular: mitosis build --config configs/angular/mitosis.config.cjs && tsx scripts/exec/angular.ts && cpr ../../output/tmp/angular/src ../../output/angular/src --overwrite
scripts.compile:react: mitosis build --config configs/react/mitosis.config.cjs && tsx scripts/exec/react.ts && cpr ../../output/tmp/react/src ../../output/react/src --overwrite
scripts.compile:stencil: mitosis build --config configs/stencil/mitosis.config.cjs && tsx scripts/exec/stencil.ts && cpr ../../output/tmp/stencil/src ../../output/stencil/src --overwrite
scripts.compile:vue: mitosis build --config configs/vue/mitosis.config.cjs && tsx scripts/exec/vue.ts && cpr ../../output/tmp/vue/src ../../output/vue/src --overwrite
scripts.dev:angular: nodemon --watch src --watch scripts --watch configs --ext tsx,ts,cjs --exec "npm run compile:angular"
scripts.dev:html: pnpm run copy-assets && pnpm run build-assets && pnpm run build-style:01_sass && vite --open
scripts.dev:react: nodemon --watch src --watch scripts --watch configs --ext tsx,ts,cjs --exec "pnpm run compile:react"
scripts.dev:stencil: nodemon --watch src --watch scripts --watch configs --ext tsx,ts,cjs --exec "pnpm run compile:stencil"
scripts.dev:vue: nodemon --watch src --watch scripts --watch configs --ext tsx,ts,cjs --exec "pnpm run compile:vue"
scripts.start: nodemon --watch src --watch scripts --watch scripts --ext js,tsx,ts,scss,json --exec "pnpm run build"
